purpose: shows how the persisted pull base package becomes immutable provenance for push preflight, remote snapshot hash listing, dry-run plan upload, batched apply, journal inspect, and inspect-first recovery

pull_exports.exporter: scans the merge base and coverage evidence
pull_exports.importer: persists the base package as immutable provenance

push_bindings.push_preflight: binds the persisted pull base to the live remote identity and a short-lived push session
push_bindings.push_snapshot_hashes: lists the live remote comparison set for planning only
push_bindings.push_plan_dry_run: uploads the canonical plan as eligibility evidence and returns a receipt without mutating target resources
push_bindings.push_batch_apply: revalidates fresh live evidence before every batch and again at the storage boundary, and rechecks the auth floor before mutation
push_bindings.push_journal: reads durable claim, lease, fencing, and idempotency evidence without granting write authority
push_bindings.push_recover: starts with inspect and only mutates when journal evidence plus fresh live hashes prove the action

push_sequence.preflight: bind the persisted pull base to the live remote identity and mint a short-lived push session
push_sequence.snapshot_hash_listing: collect the live remote comparison set for planning only
push_sequence.dry_run_plan_upload: upload the canonical plan as eligibility evidence and receive a receipt, not a lock
push_sequence.mutation_batch_apply: revalidate live remote evidence before every batch and at the storage boundary, and recheck the auth floor before mutation
push_sequence.journal_inspect: read durable evidence without authorizing mutation
push_sequence.recovery_inspect: inspect first, then allow mutating repair only when fresh live hashes prove the action

invariants: dry-run and apply are separate remote operations
remote snapshot hash listing is planning evidence, not write authority
dry-run is a receipt, not a lock
apply must revalidate the live remote before every batch and at the storage boundary
apply must recheck the auth floor before mutation
journal inspection is read-only and never authorizes mutation by itself
recovery must begin with inspect before any mutating repair
